data_deps.name: hypseek-pretrain
data_deps.description: Uni-Mol mol/pocket pretrained weights from deepmodeling/Uni-Mol v0.1.

data_deps.name: hypseek-hf-cache
data_deps.description: ESM2-t12-35M tokenizer + weights cached for offline use.

data_deps.name: hypseek-vs-data
data_deps.description: HypSeek VS training/validation data (lmdbs, label sequences, cluster files) from authors' figshare release.

data_deps.name: hypseek-test-datasets
data_deps.description: DUD-E / DEKOIS 2.0x / LIT-PCBA processed bundles + manifest JSONs (LigUnity layout).

data_deps.name: hypseek-uniport-fasta
data_deps.description: UniProt FASTA cache derived from the generated test-set manifests, fetched from rest.uniprot.org.

install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget unzip && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install lmdb tqdm wandb requests biopandas loguru scipy scikit-learn pandas rdkit-pypi transformers gdown 'numpy<2'
